_meta.description: CWE to Thailand PDPA (Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562) mapping

CWE-312.name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information
CWE-312.requirement: Appropriate security measures for personal data

CWE-311.name: Missing Encryption of Sensitive Data
CWE-311.requirement: Appropriate security measures for personal data

CWE-359.name: Exposure of Private Personal Information
CWE-359.requirement: Consent for collection, explicit consent for sensitive data

CWE-532.name: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File

CWE-200.name: Exposure of Sensitive Information to Unauthorized Actor

CWE-209.name: Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information

CWE-863.name: Incorrect Authorization
CWE-863.requirement: Correct access control for personal data

CWE-287.name: Improper Authentication
CWE-287.requirement: Proper authentication for personal data systems

CWE-319.name: Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information
CWE-319.requirement: Encryption for data transfer, cross-border protection

CWE-614.name: Sensitive Cookie in HTTPS Session Without Secure Attribute
CWE-614.requirement: Session security for personal data access

CWE-778.name: Insufficient Logging
CWE-778.requirement: Audit trail for breach detection, 72-hour notification

CWE-117.name: Improper Output Neutralization for Logs
CWE-117.requirement: Log integrity for audit and breach investigation

CWE-79.name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
CWE-79.requirement: Prevent personal data theft via injection

CWE-918.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
CWE-918.requirement: Prevent unauthorized access to internal personal data

CWE-502.name: Deserialization of Untrusted Data
CWE-502.requirement: Prevent remote code execution accessing personal data

CWE-434.name: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
CWE-434.requirement: Prevent malicious file upload compromising data

CWE-327.name: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm

CWE-328.name: Use of Weak Hash
CWE-328.requirement: Strong cryptographic algorithms for personal data

CWE-321.name: Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key
CWE-321.requirement: Proper key management for personal data encryption

CWE-601.name: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site (Open Redirect)
CWE-601.requirement: Prevent phishing of personal data via redirect

CWE-352.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
CWE-352.requirement: Prevent unauthorized actions on personal data
